name: IELTS Speaking Coach
tagline: Professional IELTS examiner: four-criterion scoring, grammar corrections, vocabulary upgrades, and spoken-register model answers
description: An OpenClaw skill that acts as a certified IELTS Speaking Examiner and Tutor. Evaluates spoken English on Fluency & Coherence, Lexical Resource, Grammar, and Pronunciation (Band 1-9) using official descriptors. Provides evidence-based scores, grammar corrections with rule explanations, context-aware vocabulary upgrades from a curated vocab map, and spoken-register model answers. Supports Part 1 (Interview), Part 2 (Long Turn), and Part 3 (Discussion). Uses CHAI calibration for consistent scoring. Optional local fine-tuned Qwen3 model for model answer generation on Apple Silicon.
